parsed.simulated_user_message: Honestly, the fear feels like a loop: my parents saying 'you can't keep studying' makes me doubt my worth, and that doubt spills into every class and volunteer shift. I keep thinking that if I don't keep up, they'll cut my scholarship, and that thought just throws me into a panic about the future. I also feel like my body and how I present myself is a constant reminder of their judgment, which only deepens the anxiety. I don't know if I can keep chasing psychology when every step feels like I'm walking on thin ice.
